pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the AdGuard Home for Magisk module, explaining its purpose as a DNS-level ad blocker for Android devices, its key features (proxy compatibility, multi-layer blocking), and how it compares to alternative ad-blocking solutions

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Guide users through initial setup, from prerequisites through first run and verification

pages.title: Installation
pages.purpose: Detail the installation process via Magisk Manager, including prerequisite checks, conflict detection, file extraction, and post-installation steps

pages.title: Initial Configuration
pages.purpose: Explain the out-of-box configuration, how to access the Web UI, and basic configuration options in config.prop

pages.title: Verifying Operation
pages.purpose: Describe how to verify that ad blocking is working, checking DNS redirection, reviewing logs, and achieving the target 96%+ block rate

pages.title: Core Components
pages.purpose: Document the three primary components that implement ad blocking functionality

pages.title: AdGuard Home DNS Server
pages.purpose: Explain the AdGuard Home binary, its configuration in AdGuardHome.yaml, upstream DNS servers, DoH/DNSSEC support, caching, and the web management interface

pages.title: Filter Rules System
pages.purpose: Document the 8680+ built-in filter rules, external filter lists (GOODBYEADS, URLHaus), whitelist filters, custom user rules, and the Adblock Plus 2.0 syntax including patterns, options, and stealth mode features

pages.title: DNS Redirection (iptables)
pages.purpose: Explain how iptables.sh creates the ADGUARD chain to redirect DNS traffic to AdGuard Home, IPv6 DNS blocking, and the enable/disable mechanisms

pages.title: Auxiliary Services
pages.purpose: Document the three background services that provide additional functionality beyond core DNS filtering

pages.title: File-Level Ad Blocking (NoAdsService)
pages.purpose: Explain how NoAdsService.sh targets 60+ applications, uses chattr +i to make ad directories immutable, disables Private DNS, clears Intent Firewall, and cleans up deleted app data

pages.title: Proxy Integration (ProxyConfig)
pages.purpose: Document how ProxyConfig.sh automatically configures Surfing, Box, and AkashaProxy modules, updates LOCAL_DNS entries, manages proxy-providers URLs, and triggers service restarts

pages.title: Metadata Management (ModuleMOD)
pages.purpose: Explain how ModuleMOD.sh monitors system locale, dynamically generates localized module metadata in English or Chinese, and updates module.prop

pages.title: Configuration Reference
pages.purpose: Comprehensive reference documentation for all configuration files and parameters

pages.title: Module Configuration (config.prop)
pages.purpose: Document all config.prop parameters: adg_user, adg_group, redir_port, enable_iptables, block_ipv6_dns, enable_logging, and PROXY_URL

pages.title: DNS Server Configuration (AdGuardHome.yaml)
pages.purpose: Document AdGuardHome.yaml structure: HTTP server settings, DNS server binding, upstream/fallback DNS, TLS configuration, query logging, statistics, filtering rules, and all available options

pages.title: Filter Rules Syntax
pages.purpose: Complete reference for Adblock Plus 2.0 filter syntax: patterns (wildcards, separators, anchors, regex), options (domain, type filters, stealth modes), exception rules, and examples

pages.title: Module Lifecycle
pages.purpose: Document the complete lifecycle from installation through updates to uninstallation

pages.title: Installation Process
pages.purpose: Detail the installation flow: update-binary execution, Magisk version check, customize.sh operations (conflict detection, service stopping, backup, extraction, permission setting)

pages.title: Boot and Startup
pages.purpose: Explain the boot sequence: service.sh initialization, environment validation, AdGuard Home startup with verification/retry, auxiliary service launching, and log management

pages.title: Update Mechanism
pages.purpose: Document the update system: Update.json structure, versionCode comparison, ghfast.top proxy, ZIP download, changelog display, and the update installation flow

pages.title: Uninstallation
pages.purpose: Explain the uninstall process: service termination, proxy cleanup, locked file removal with chattr -i, and complete directory deletion

pages.title: Advanced Topics
pages.purpose: Cover advanced usage scenarios and customization options

pages.title: Proxy Module Compatibility
pages.purpose: Detail integration with Surfing, Box, and AkashaProxy: automatic configuration via PROXY_URL, LOCAL_DNS insertion, service restart, and airplane mode toggling

pages.title: Creating Custom Filter Rules
pages.purpose: Guide for writing custom rules: pattern syntax, option usage, testing rules, performance considerations, and integration with AdGuardHome.yaml user_rules section

pages.title: Troubleshooting
pages.purpose: Common issues and solutions: conflicting modules, cache clearing, Clash Meta system proxy, ads still appearing, performance issues, and compatibility problems

pages.title: Performance Optimization
pages.purpose: Tips for optimizing performance: DNS cache tuning, upstream server selection, rule optimization, log management, and memory usage

pages.title: Architecture and Development
pages.purpose: Deep dive into system architecture for developers and advanced users

pages.title: System Architecture
pages.purpose: Comprehensive architecture documentation: component diagram, data flow, service orchestration, configuration hierarchy, and design patterns

pages.title: Script Reference
pages.purpose: Technical reference for all scripts: customize.sh, service.sh, uninstall.sh, ModuleMOD.sh, NoAdsService.sh, ProxyConfig.sh, iptables.sh - including functions, variables, and execution flow
